summary: Map Management page simplification testing complete. All features verified working - page now shows only floor management (no tabs). Daily Sessions page confirmed with all 5 tabs (Map, Zones, Changes, Density, Stats). Navigation works correctly.

map_management_page: NO TABS present - page simplified to floors-only (was 3 tabs: Floors, Zones, Crowd)
4 Stats cards display: Total Floors (2), With Image (2), Without Image (0), Floor Range (0-1)
Floor cards (2) display with images, names (Arabic/English), floor numbers, badges
Add Floor button opens dialog with: Arabic name, English name, floor number, order, image upload
Edit Floor button opens dialog pre-filled with existing floor data
Delete Floor button shows confirmation dialog with floor name
All dialog buttons (Save, Cancel, Confirm Delete) work correctly
Image dropzone supports drag & drop and file selection
Floor image preview shows in dialog
daily_sessions_page: Page title displays 'السجل اليومي للخرائط' (Daily Map Log)
All 5 tabs present: الخريطة (Map), المناطق (Zones), التغييرات (Changes), الكثافات (Density), إحصائيات (Stats)
Zones tab shows badge with zone count (1)
Session map displays with floor image
Session header shows date, status, zone count
daily_gates_page: Page title displays 'السجل اليومي للأبواب' (Daily Gates Log)
Calendar and session list display correctly

critical_code_review_comments: MapManagementPage.jsx reduced from ~1697 lines to ~422 lines - good simplification
DailySessionsPage.jsx correctly has all 5 tabs including Density which was moved from Map Management
seed_data_creation: Using existing floors: 'الدور الأرضي' (floor 1), 'طابق البدروم' (floor 0). Using existing session from Feb 17, 2026.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 tested the SIMPLIFIED Map Management page (/map-management). The page previously had 3 tabs (Floors, Zones, Crowd Density) - now it only shows floor cards directly without tabs. Zones and Density functionality is now in Daily Sessions page (/daily-sessions) which has 5 tabs: Map, Zones, Changes, Density, Stats. Data-testids: map-management-page, page-title, total-floors-count, add-floor-button, floor-card-{id}, floor-name-{id}, floor-edit-{id}, floor-delete-{id}, floor-name-ar-input, floor-name-en-input, floor-number-input, floor-order-input, floor-image-dropzone, floor-dialog-save-button, floor-dialog-cancel-button, delete-floor-dialog-text, delete-floor-confirm-button, delete-floor-cancel-button. For Daily Sessions: daily-sessions-page, tab-map, tab-zones, tab-changes, tab-density, tab-stats, floor-select, session-card-{id}, calendar-day-{n}.

map_management_simplified.details: No tabs - floor cards displayed directly in grid. Page is ~422 lines (was ~1697)

floor_cards.details: 2 floors display with images, names, badges, edit/delete buttons

floor_stats.details: 4 stats cards: Total (2), With Image (2), No Image (0), Range (0-1)

add_floor_dialog.details: Dialog has name_ar, name_en, floor_number, order inputs, image upload

edit_floor_dialog.details: Dialog pre-fills with existing data, image preview shown

delete_floor_dialog.details: Confirmation dialog shows floor name, has confirm/cancel buttons

daily_sessions_5_tabs.details: All 5 tabs present: Map, Zones (with badge), Changes, Density, Stats

daily_gates_page.details: Page loads with calendar, session list, gate selector

navigation.details: Sidebar links work for all pages
